meta.title: Hebrew Torah - Five Books of Moses
meta.description: The Five Books of Moses (Pentateuch) with Hebrew text and English translation

verses.hebrew: בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָרֶץ
verses.english: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
verses.transliteration: Bereshit bara Elohim et hashamayim ve'et ha'aretz

verses.hebrew: וְהָאָרֶץ הָיְתָה תֹהוּ וָבֹהוּ וְחֹשֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵי תְהוֹם וְרוּחַ אֱלֹהִים מְרַחֶפֶת עַל־פְּנֵי הַמָּיִם
verses.english: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
verses.transliteration: Veha'aretz hayetah tohu vavohu vechoshech al-penei tehom veruach Elohim merachefet al-penei hamayim

verses.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים יְהִי אוֹר וַיְהִי־אוֹר
verses.english: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
verses.transliteration: Vayomer Elohim yehi or vayehi-or

verses.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים נַעֲשֶׂה אָדָם בְּצַלְמֵנוּ כִּדְמוּתֵנוּ
verses.english: And God said, Let us make man in our image, after our likeness.
verses.transliteration: Vayomer Elohim na'aseh adam betzalmenu kidmutenu

verses.hebrew: וַיִּבְרָא אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָאָדָם בְּצַלְמוֹ בְּצֶלֶם אֱלֹהִים בָּרָא אֹתוֹ זָכָר וּנְקֵבָה בָּרָא אֹתָם
verses.english: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God created he him; male and female created he them.
verses.transliteration: Vayivra Elohim et-ha'adam betzalmo betzelem Elohim bara oto zachar unekevah bara otam

verses.hebrew: וַיִּיצֶר יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָאָדָם עָפָר מִן־הָאֲדָמָה וַיִּפַּח בְּאַפָּיו נִשְׁמַת חַיִּים וַיְהִי הָאָדָם לְנֶפֶשׁ חַיָּה
verses.english: And the LORD God formed man of the dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life; and man became a living soul.
verses.transliteration: Vayitzer Adonai Elohim et-ha'adam afar min-ha'adamah vayipach be'apav nishmat chayim vayehi ha'adam lenefesh chayah

verses.hebrew: בְּזֵעַת אַפֶּיךָ תֹּאכַל לֶחֶם עַד שׁוּבְךָ אֶל־הָאֲדָמָה כִּי מִמֶּנָּה לֻקָּחְתָּ כִּי־עָפָר אַתָּה וְאֶל־עָפָר תָּשׁוּב
verses.english: In the sweat of thy face shalt thou eat bread, till thou return unto the ground; for out of it wast thou taken: for dust thou art, and unto dust shalt thou return.
verses.transliteration: Bezeat apecha tochal lechem ad shuvcha el-ha'adamah ki mimenah lukachta ki-afar atah ve'el-afar tashuv

verses.hebrew: אֵלֶּה תּוֹלְדֹת נֹחַ נֹחַ אִישׁ צַדִּיק תָּמִים הָיָה בְּדֹרֹתָיו אֶת־הָאֱלֹהִים הִתְהַלֶּךְ־נֹחַ
verses.english: These are the generations of Noah: Noah was a just man and perfect in his generations, and Noah walked with God.
verses.transliteration: Eleh toldot Noach Noach ish tzaddik tamim hayah bedorotav et-haElohim hithalech-Noach

verses.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֶל־אַבְרָם לֶךְ־לְךָ מֵאַרְצְךָ וּמִמּוֹלַדְתְּךָ וּמִבֵּית אָבִיךָ אֶל־הָאָרֶץ אֲשֶׁר אַרְאֶךָּ
verses.english: Now the LORD had said unto Abram, Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father's house, unto a land that I will shew thee.
verses.transliteration: Vayomer Adonai el-Avram lech-lecha me'artzecha umimoladtecha umibeit avicha el-ha'aretz asher ar'eka

verses.hebrew: וְאֶעֶשְׂךָ לְגוֹי גָּדוֹל וַאֲבָרֶכְךָ וַאֲגַדְּלָה שְׁמֶךָ וֶהְיֵה בְּרָכָה
verses.english: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and thou shalt be a blessing.
verses.transliteration: Ve'e'escha legoi gadol va'avarechecha va'agadlah shemecha veheyeh berachah

verses.hebrew: וְהֶאֱמִן בַּיהוָה וַיַּחְשְׁבֶהָ לּוֹ צְדָקָה
verses.english: And he believed in the LORD; and he counted it to him for righteousness.
verses.transliteration: Vehe'emin baAdonai vayachshevehah lo tzedakah

verses.hebrew: וְלֹא־יִקָּרֵא עוֹד אֶת־שִׁמְךָ אַבְרָם וְהָיָה שִׁמְךָ אַבְרָהָם כִּי אַב־הֲמוֹן גּוֹיִם נְתַתִּיךָ
verses.english: Neither shall thy name any more be called Abram, but thy name shall be Abraham; for a father of many nations have I made thee.
verses.transliteration: Velo-yikare od et-shimcha Avram vehayah shimcha Avraham ki av-hamon goyim netatticha

verses.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר קַח־נָא אֶת־בִּנְךָ אֶת־יְחִידְךָ אֲשֶׁר־אָהַבְתָּ אֶת־יִצְחָק וְלֶךְ־לְךָ אֶל־אֶרֶץ הַמֹּרִיָּה וְהַעֲלֵהוּ שָׁם לְעֹלָה
verses.english: And he said, Take now thy son, thine only son Isaac, whom thou lovest, and get thee into the land of Moriah; and offer him there for a burnt offering.
verses.transliteration: Vayomer kach-na et-bincha et-yechidcha asher-ahavta et-Yitzchak velech-lecha el-eretz haMoriyah veha'alehu sham le'olah

verses.hebrew: וַיַּחֲלֹם וְהִנֵּה סֻלָּם מֻצָּב אַרְצָה וְרֹאשׁוֹ מַגִּיעַ הַשָּׁמָיְמָה וְהִנֵּה מַלְאֲכֵי אֱלֹהִים עֹלִים וְיֹרְדִים בּוֹ
verses.english: And he dreamed, and behold a ladder set up on the earth, and the top of it reached to heaven: and behold the angels of God ascending and descending on it.
verses.transliteration: Vayachalom vehineh sulam mutzav artzah verosho magia hashamaimah vehineh mal'achei Elohim olim veyordim bo

verses.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר לֹא יַעֲקֹב יֵאָמֵר עוֹד שִׁמְךָ כִּי אִם־יִשְׂרָאֵל כִּי־שָׂרִיתָ עִם־אֱלֹהִים וְעִם־אֲנָשִׁים וַתּוּכָל
verses.english: And he said, Thy name shall be called no more Jacob, but Israel: for as a prince hast thou power with God and with men, and hast prevailed.
verses.transliteration: Vayomer lo Ya'akov ye'amer od shimcha ki im-Yisrael ki-sarita im-Elohim ve'im-anashim vatuchal

verses.hebrew: לֹא־יָסוּר שֵׁבֶט מִיהוּדָה וּמְחֹקֵק מִבֵּין רַגְלָיו עַד כִּי־יָבֹא שִׁילֹה וְלוֹ יִקְּהַת עַמִּים
verses.english: The sceptre shall not depart from Judah, nor a lawgiver from between his feet, until Shiloh come; and unto him shall the gathering of the people be.
verses.transliteration: Lo-yasur shevet miYehudah umechokek mibein raglav ad ki-yavo Shiloh velo yikhat amim

verses.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים אֶל־מֹשֶׁה אֶהְיֶה אֲשֶׁר אֶהְיֶה וַיֹּאמֶר כֹּה תֹאמַר לִבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶהְיֶה שְׁלָחַנִי אֲלֵיכֶם
verses.english: And God said unto Moses, I AM THAT I AM: and he said, Thus shalt thou say unto the children of Israel, I AM hath sent me unto you.
verses.transliteration: Vayomer Elohim el-Moshe Ehyeh asher Ehyeh vayomer koh tomar livnei Yisrael Ehyeh shelachani aleichem

verses.hebrew: וָאֵרָא אֶל־אַבְרָהָם אֶל־יִצְחָק וְאֶל־יַעֲקֹב בְּאֵל שַׁדָּי וּשְׁמִי יְהוָה לֹא נוֹדַעְתִּי לָהֶם
verses.english: And I appeared unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob, by the name of God Almighty, but by my name JEHOVAH was I not known to them.
verses.transliteration: Va'era el-Avraham el-Yitzchak ve'el-Ya'akov be'El Shaddai ushmi Adonai lo nodati lahem

verses.hebrew: וְהָיָה הַדָּם לָכֶם לְאֹת עַל הַבָּתִּים אֲשֶׁר אַתֶּם שָׁם וְרָאִיתִי אֶת־הַדָּם וּפָסַחְתִּי עֲלֵכֶם
verses.english: And the blood shall be to you for a token upon the houses where ye are: and when I see the blood, I will pass over you.
verses.transliteration: Vehayah hadam lachem le'ot al habatim asher atem sham vera'iti et-hadam ufasachti aleichem

verses.hebrew: וַיֵּט מֹשֶׁה אֶת־יָדוֹ עַל־הַיָּם וַיּוֹלֶךְ יְהוָה אֶת־הַיָּם בְּרוּחַ קָדִים עַזָּה כָּל־הַלַּיְלָה
verses.english: And Moses stretched out his hand over the sea; and the LORD caused the sea to go back by a strong east wind all that night.
verses.transliteration: Vayet Moshe et-yado al-hayam vayolech Adonai et-hayam beruach kadim azah kol-halailah

verses.hebrew: וַיְדַבֵּר אֱלֹהִים אֵת כָּל־הַדְּבָרִים הָאֵלֶּה לֵאמֹר
verses.english: And God spake all these words, saying,
verses.transliteration: Vayedaber Elohim et kol-hadevarim ha'eleh lemor

verses.hebrew: אָנֹכִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ אֲשֶׁר הוֹצֵאתִיךָ מֵאֶרֶץ מִצְרַיִם מִבֵּית עֲבָדִים
verses.english: I am the LORD thy God, which have brought thee out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.
verses.transliteration: Anochi Adonai Elohecha asher hotzeticha me'eretz Mitzrayim mibeit avadim

verses.hebrew: לֹא יִהְיֶה־לְךָ אֱלֹהִים אֲחֵרִים עַל־פָּנָי
verses.english: Thou shalt have no other gods before me.
verses.transliteration: Lo yihyeh-lecha elohim acherim al-panai

verses.hebrew: לֹא תִשָּׂא אֶת־שֵׁם־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ לַשָּׁוְא
verses.english: Thou shalt not take the name of the LORD thy God in vain.
verses.transliteration: Lo tisa et-shem-Adonai Elohecha lashav

verses.hebrew: זָכוֹר אֶת־יוֹם הַשַּׁבָּת לְקַדְּשׁוֹ
verses.english: Remember the sabbath day, to keep it holy.
verses.transliteration: Zachor et-yom haShabbat lekadsho

verses.hebrew: כַּבֵּד אֶת־אָבִיךָ וְאֶת־אִמֶּךָ לְמַעַן יַאֲרִכוּן יָמֶיךָ עַל הָאֲדָמָה
verses.english: Honour thy father and thy mother: that thy days may be long upon the land.
verses.transliteration: Kabed et-avicha ve'et-imecha lema'an ya'arichun yamecha al ha'adamah

verses.hebrew: לֹא תִרְצָח
verses.english: Thou shalt not kill.
verses.transliteration: Lo tirtzach

verses.hebrew: לֹא תִנְאָף
verses.english: Thou shalt not commit adultery.
verses.transliteration: Lo tin'af

verses.hebrew: לֹא תִגְנֹב
verses.english: Thou shalt not steal.
verses.transliteration: Lo tignov

verses.hebrew: לֹא־תַעֲנֶה בְרֵעֲךָ עֵד שָׁקֶר
verses.english: Thou shalt not bear false witness against thy neighbour.
verses.transliteration: Lo-ta'aneh vere'acha ed shaker

verses.hebrew: לֹא תַחְמֹד בֵּית רֵעֶךָ לֹא־תַחְמֹד אֵשֶׁת רֵעֶךָ
verses.english: Thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's house, thou shalt not covet thy neighbour's wife.
verses.transliteration: Lo tachmod beit re'echa lo-tachmod eshet re'echa

verses.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר לֹא תוּכַל לִרְאֹת אֶת־פָּנָי כִּי לֹא־יִרְאַנִי הָאָדָם וָחָי
verses.english: And he said, Thou canst not see my face: for there shall no man see me, and live.
verses.transliteration: Vayomer lo tuchal lir'ot et-panai ki lo-yir'ani ha'adam vachai

verses.hebrew: כִּי אֲנִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵיכֶם וְהִתְקַדִּשְׁתֶּם וִהְיִיתֶם קְדֹשִׁים כִּי קָדוֹשׁ אָנִי
verses.english: For I am the LORD your God: ye shall therefore sanctify yourselves, and ye shall be holy; for I am holy.
verses.transliteration: Ki ani Adonai Eloheichem vehitkadishtem vihyitem kedoshim ki kadosh ani

verses.hebrew: כִּי נֶפֶשׁ הַבָּשָׂר בַּדָּם הִוא וַאֲנִי נְתַתִּיו לָכֶם עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּחַ לְכַפֵּר עַל־נַפְשֹׁתֵיכֶם
verses.english: For the life of the flesh is in the blood: and I have given it to you upon the altar to make an atonement for your souls.
verses.transliteration: Ki nefesh habasar badam hi va'ani netativ lachem al-hamizbe'ach lechaper al-nafshotechem

verses.hebrew: דַּבֵּר אֶל־כָּל־עֲדַת בְּנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵל וְאָמַרְתָּ אֲלֵהֶם קְדֹשִׁים תִּהְיוּ כִּי קָדוֹשׁ אֲנִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵיכֶם
verses.english: Speak unto all the congregation of the children of Israel, and say unto them, Ye shall be holy: for I the LORD your God am holy.
verses.transliteration: Daber el-kol-adat bnei-Yisrael ve'amarta alehem kedoshim tihyu ki kadosh ani Adonai Eloheichem

verses.hebrew: לֹא־תִקֹּם וְלֹא־תִטֹּר אֶת־בְּנֵי עַמֶּךָ וְאָהַבְתָּ לְרֵעֲךָ כָּמוֹךָ אֲנִי יְהוָה
verses.english: Thou shalt not avenge, nor bear any grudge against the children of thy people, but thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself: I am the LORD.
verses.transliteration: Lo-tikom velo-titor et-bnei amecha ve'ahavta lere'acha kamocha ani Adonai

verses.hebrew: שֵׁשֶׁת יָמִים תֵּעָשֶׂה מְלָאכָה וּבַיּוֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִי שַׁבַּת שַׁבָּתוֹן מִקְרָא־קֹדֶשׁ
verses.english: Six days shall work be done: but the seventh day is the sabbath of rest, an holy convocation.
verses.transliteration: Sheshet yamim te'aseh melachah uvayom hashvi'i Shabbat shabbaton mikra-kodesh

verses.hebrew: וְקִדַּשְׁתֶּם אֵת שְׁנַת הַחֲמִשִּׁים שָׁנָה וּקְרָאתֶם דְּרוֹר בָּאָרֶץ לְכָל־יֹשְׁבֶיהָ יוֹבֵל הִוא תִּהְיֶה לָכֶם
verses.english: And ye shall hallow the fiftieth year, and proclaim liberty throughout all the land unto all the inhabitants thereof: it shall be a jubilee unto you.
verses.transliteration: Vekidashtem et shnat hachamishim shanah ukeratem dror ba'aretz lechol-yoshveha yovel hi tihyeh lachem

verses.hebrew: יְבָרֶכְךָ יְהוָה וְיִשְׁמְרֶךָ
verses.english: The LORD bless thee, and keep thee.
verses.transliteration: Yevarechecha Adonai veyishmerecha

verses.hebrew: יָאֵר יְהוָה פָּנָיו אֵלֶיךָ וִיחֻנֶּךָּ
verses.english: The LORD make his face shine upon thee, and be gracious unto thee.
verses.transliteration: Ya'er Adonai panav eleicha vichuneka

verses.hebrew: יִשָּׂא יְהוָה פָּנָיו אֵלֶיךָ וְיָשֵׂם לְךָ שָׁלוֹם
verses.english: The LORD lift up his countenance upon thee, and give thee peace.
verses.transliteration: Yisa Adonai panav eleicha veyasem lecha shalom

verses.hebrew: יְהוָה אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם וְרַב־חֶסֶד נֹשֵׂא עָוֺן וָפָשַׁע
verses.english: The LORD is longsuffering, and of great mercy, forgiving iniquity and transgression.
verses.transliteration: Adonai erech apayim verav-chesed nose avon vafesha

verses.hebrew: לֹא אִישׁ אֵל וִיכַזֵּב וּבֶן־אָדָם וְיִתְנֶחָם הַהוּא אָמַר וְלֹא יַעֲשֶׂה וְדִבֶּר וְלֹא יְקִימֶנָּה
verses.english: God is not a man, that he should lie; neither the son of man, that he should repent: hath he said, and shall he not do it?
verses.transliteration: Lo ish El vikhazev uven-adam veyitnecham hahu amar velo ya'aseh vediber velo yekimenah

verses.hebrew: אֶרְאֶנּוּ וְלֹא עַתָּה אֲשׁוּרֶנּוּ וְלֹא קָרוֹב דָּרַךְ כּוֹכָב מִיַּעֲקֹב וְקָם שֵׁבֶט מִיִּשְׂרָאֵל
verses.english: I shall see him, but not now: I shall behold him, but not nigh: there shall come a Star out of Jacob, and a Sceptre shall rise out of Israel.
verses.transliteration: Er'enu velo atah ashurenu velo karov darach kochav miYa'akov vekam shevet miYisrael

verses.hebrew: וּבִקַּשְׁתֶּם מִשָּׁם אֶת־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ וּמָצָאתָ כִּי תִדְרְשֶׁנּוּ בְּכָל־לְבָבְךָ וּבְכָל־נַפְשֶׁךָ
verses.english: But if from thence thou shalt seek the LORD thy God, thou shalt find him, if thou seek him with all thy heart and with all thy soul.
verses.transliteration: Uvikashtem misham et-Adonai Elohecha umatzata ki tidreshenu bechol-levavcha uvechol-nafshecha

verses.hebrew: שְׁמַע יִשְׂרָאֵל יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ יְהוָה אֶחָד
verses.english: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God is one LORD.
verses.transliteration: Shema Yisrael Adonai Eloheinu Adonai Echad

verses.hebrew: וְאָהַבְתָּ אֵת יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ בְּכָל־לְבָבְךָ וּבְכָל־נַפְשְׁךָ וּבְכָל־מְאֹדֶךָ
verses.english: And thou shalt love the LORD thy God with all thine heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.
verses.transliteration: Ve'ahavta et Adonai Elohecha bechol-levavcha uvechol-nafshecha uvechol-me'odecha

verses.hebrew: וַיְעַנְּךָ וַיַּרְעִבֶךָ וַיַּאֲכִלְךָ אֶת־הַמָּן אֲשֶׁר לֹא־יָדַעְתָּ וְלֹא יָדְעוּן אֲבֹתֶיךָ לְמַעַן הוֹדִיעֲךָ כִּי לֹא עַל־הַלֶּחֶם לְבַדּוֹ יִחְיֶה הָאָדָם כִּי עַל־כָּל־מוֹצָא פִי־יְהוָה יִחְיֶה הָאָדָם
verses.english: And he humbled thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of the LORD doth man live.
verses.transliteration: Vaye'ancha vayar'ivecha vaya'achilcha et-haman asher lo-yadata velo yade'un avotecha lema'an hodi'acha ki lo al-halechem levado yichyeh ha'adam ki al-kol-motza fi-Adonai yichyeh ha'adam

verses.hebrew: וְעַתָּה יִשְׂרָאֵל מָה יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ שֹׁאֵל מֵעִמָּךְ כִּי אִם־לְיִרְאָה אֶת־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ לָלֶכֶת בְּכָל־דְּרָכָיו וּלְאַהֲבָה אֹתוֹ וְלַעֲבֹד אֶת־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ בְּכָל־לְבָבְךָ וּבְכָל־נַפְשֶׁךָ
verses.english: And now, Israel, what doth the LORD thy God require of thee, but to fear the LORD thy God, to walk in all his ways, and to love him, and to serve the LORD thy God with all thy heart and with all thy soul.
verses.transliteration: Ve'atah Yisrael mah Adonai Elohecha sho'el me'imach ki im-leyir'ah et-Adonai Elohecha lalechet bechol-derachav ule'ahavah oto vela'avod et-Adonai Elohecha bechol-levavcha uvechol-nafshecha

verses.hebrew: נָבִיא מִקִּרְבְּךָ מֵאַחֶיךָ כָּמֹנִי יָקִים לְךָ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ אֵלָיו תִּשְׁמָעוּן
verses.english: The LORD thy God will raise up unto thee a Prophet from the midst of thee, of thy brethren, like unto me; unto him ye shall hearken.
verses.transliteration: Navi mikirb'cha me'acheicha kamoni yakim lecha Adonai Elohecha elav tishma'un

verses.hebrew: הַנִּסְתָּרֹת לַיהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ וְהַנִּגְלֹת לָנוּ וּלְבָנֵינוּ עַד־עוֹלָם לַעֲשׂוֹת אֶת־כָּל־דִּבְרֵי הַתּוֹרָה הַזֹּאת
verses.english: The secret things belong unto the LORD our God: but those things which are revealed belong unto us and to our children for ever.
verses.transliteration: Hanistarot laAdonai Eloheinu vehaniglot lanu ulevanenu ad-olam la'asot et-kol-divrei haTorah hazot

verses.hebrew: הַעִדֹתִי בָכֶם הַיּוֹם אֶת־הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֶת־הָאָרֶץ הַחַיִּים וְהַמָּוֶת נָתַתִּי לְפָנֶיךָ הַבְּרָכָה וְהַקְּלָלָה וּבָחַרְתָּ בַּחַיִּים לְמַעַן תִּחְיֶה אַתָּה וְזַרְעֶךָ
verses.english: I call heaven and earth to record this day against you, that I have set before you life and death, blessing and cursing: therefore choose life, that both thou and thy seed may live.
verses.transliteration: Ha'idoti vachem hayom et-hashamayim ve'et-ha'aretz hachayim vehamavet natati lefanecha haberachah vehakelalah uvacharta bachayim lema'an tichyeh atah vezar'echa

verses.hebrew: הַצּוּר תָּמִים פָּעֳלוֹ כִּי כָל־דְּרָכָיו מִשְׁפָּט אֵל אֱמוּנָה וְאֵין עָוֶל צַדִּיק וְיָשָׁר הוּא
verses.english: He is the Rock, his work is perfect: for all his ways are judgment: a God of truth and without iniquity, just and right is he.
verses.transliteration: Hatzur tamim pa'olo ki chol-derachav mishpat El emunah ve'ein avel tzaddik veyashar hu

verses.hebrew: וְלֹא־קָם נָבִיא עוֹד בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל כְּמֹשֶׁה אֲשֶׁר יְדָעוֹ יְהוָה פָּנִים אֶל־פָּנִים
verses.english: And there arose not a prophet since in Israel like unto Moses, whom the LORD knew face to face.
verses.transliteration: Velo-kam navi od beYisrael keMoshe asher yeda'o Adonai panim el-panim
